stemHtml: Which statement is true about the IVSI?

options.a: The use of the IVSI reduces turning errors.
options.b: The IVSI has its own power supply, independent of the aircraft.
options.c: The almost instantaneous indications from the IVSI provide the flight crew with reliable information in all phases of flight.
options.d: The IVSI can give erroneous readings while initiating or ending turns at bank angles of more than around 40°.
